_comment: CAD model: printed PETG cylinder that mounts on existing 4-in cast iron tube and holds 26 magnets
_shaft: reference body only — existing cast iron tube, not printed
_cylinder: printed PETG cylinder — bore fits over shaft OD
_magnets: 20x10x5 mm NdFeB N52 — reference only, not modelled yet
_split: cylinder splits into two mirror-image halves at seam planes centered in magnet gaps
_dovetail: axially-sliding dovetail at each seam — tail on one end, groove on the other
